recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: Graduation Day
recommendations.overview: After the death of a high school track star during a race, a mysterious killer in a fencing mask begins murdering her friends and teachers.

recommendations.title: The Seed of the Sacred Fig
recommendations.overview: Investigating judge Iman grapples with paranoia amid political unrest in Tehran. When his gun vanishes, he suspects his wife and daughters, imposing draconian measures that strain family ties as societal rules crumble.

recommendations.title: Fast Girls
recommendations.overview: A street smart runner develops an intense rivalry with an equally ambitious wealthy young athlete.

recommendations.title: Ultraman: Rising
recommendations.overview: A star athlete reluctantly returns home to take over his father's duties as Ultraman, shielding Tokyo from giant monsters as he becomes a legendary hero.

recommendations.title: Barry
recommendations.overview: A young Barack Obama forges his identity while dealing with race, divergent cultures and ordinary life as a New York City college student.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.

recommendations.title: The Last Letter from Your Lover
recommendations.overview: A young journalist in London becomes obsessed with a series of letters she discovers that recounts an intense star-crossed love affair from the 1960s.

recommendations.title: Red Dawn
recommendations.overview: On October 2, 1968, a student uprising descends into violence after the Mexican government begins to use lethal force against the protesters.

recommendations.title: Sweet Virginia
recommendations.overview: A former rodeo star, now a motel manager, meets a young man who is responsible for the violence that suddenly has seized his small town.
